userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 8 Start date can't be different per leg in Markitwire
MW id 21 Xccy swap with reset on leg 1 are not MW compatible
MW id 19 Flows schedule can not be customized in Markitwire - period 0 / leg 1
MW id 6.1 Not possible in VCON to book Float Float XXCY
MW id 7.1 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 9 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay USD LIBOR 6M on floating leg 21,600,000 Receive GBP LIBOR 6M on floating leg 13,500,000 Expiry 10 sep 2016
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
MW id 17 Start date can not be prior to insertion date unless full coupon is activated
MW id 21 Xccy swap with reset on leg 1 are not MW compatible
MW id 8 Start date can't be different per leg in Markitwire
MW id 6.1 Not possible in VCON to book Float Float XXCY
MW id 7.1 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 9 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay USD LIBOR 6M on floating leg 16,000,000 Receive GBP LIBOR 6M on floating leg 10,000,000 Expiry 10 sep 2016
Cross Currency Resettable Interest Rate Swap
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
